messages.content: hi
Hello! How can I help you today? If you have any questions or need assistance with something, feel free to ask.
帮我把下面这段话翻译为英文。我们的模型可以从各种类型的2D图中中生成3D模型
Our model can generate 3D models from various types of 2D images.
帮我把下面这段话翻译为英文。没有 DreamBooth 的第一和第二阶段
Without the first and second stages of DreamBooth.
帮我把下面这段话翻译为英文。没有SD无条件噪音生成的3D模型的纹理颜色存在偏差，同时形状也不平滑
The texture color of the 3D models generated by SD unconditional noise lacks accuracy, and the shapes are not smooth.
没用使用输入视角监督和Dreambooth生成的3D、
3D models generated without using input viewpoint supervision and DreamBooth.
没用使用输入视角监督和Dreambooth生成的纹理细节不够，存在模糊
The texture details of the 3D models generated without using input viewpoint supervision and DreamBooth are insufficient, resulting in blurriness.
帮我把下面这段话翻译为英文。没用使用输入视角监督和Dreambooth生成的纹理细节不够，存在模糊
The texture details of 3D models generated without the use of input viewpoint supervision and DreamBooth are inadequate, leading to blurriness.
Not using input view supervision will result in the inability to recover the same texture details as the input image, and not using DreamBooth will result in blurring of texture details. 翻译为中文
不使用输入视角监督将导致无法恢复与输入图像相同的纹理细节，不使用DreamBooth将导致纹理细节的模糊。
Not using input view supervision will result in the inability to recover the same texture details as the input image, and not using DreamBooth will result in blurring of texture details. 帮我重写
Lacking supervision from the input viewpoint means the model fails to replicate the input image's precise texture details, while omitting DreamBooth leads to a loss of clarity in the textures.
不使用输入视角监督将导致无法恢复与输入图像相同的纹理细节，不使用DreamBooth将导致纹理细节的模糊。
如果不采用输入视角的监督，将无法重现输入图像的具体纹理细节；同时，如果不使用DreamBooth技术，纹理细节也将会出现模糊现象。
下面帮我翻译为英文。不使用输入视角监督将导致无法恢复与输入图像相同的纹理细节，不使用DreamBooth将导致纹理细节的模糊。

Not employing input view supervision results in an inability to reconstruct the same texture details as those in the input image, while abstaining from using DreamBooth leads to a blur in the texture details.
For images taken deviating from the front view, a manual change of polar angle or a camera estimation is required.
对于偏离正面视角拍摄的图像，需要手动改变极角或进行相机估计。
